title: Hiring Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital
jsonLd.description:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Coimbatore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital:
Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Deenanath Mangeshkar Hospital!
